page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package for detecting complex joint effects in case-control studies. The test statistic is derived from a tree-structure model by recursive partitioning the data. Ultra-fast algorithm is designed to evaluate the significance of association between candidate gene and disease outcome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package for detecting complex joint effects in case-control studies.
